summary: Video. A 2018 DHS and NFL co-branded 'See Something, Say Something' announcement in which an NFL referee in a locker room speaks to camera, comparing officiating to watching the stands, and asks fans to report suspicious activity to local law enforcement. A single narrator speaks, with NFL and DHS logos and no music track.
notable_text: You play an important role in keeping our communities safe. / If you see something suspicious... say something to local law enforcement. / Report suspicious activity to local law enforcement. WE CARE ABOUT THE SAFETY OF OUR FANS. NFL / Homeland Security.
